'''Lekua V''', also known simply as '''Lekua''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]], a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It had several [[University/Legends|universities]].
